label: plain_text
text:
a. 5-digit number + 5-digit number:
gives a 5-digit number
b. 4-digit number + 2-digit number 
gives a 4-digit number
4-digit number + 2-digit number g
C. L
gives a 6-digit number
d. 5-digit number - 5-digit number g
gives a 5-digit number
5-digit number - 2-digit number 
e. 5
gives a 3-digit number
